testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_video_evidence_participant_access_iter166.py:302: in test_appointment_api_returns_appointment_type assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to list appointments: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to list appointments: {"detail":"Token d'authentification manquant"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
